data.title: Tarkett reports total voting rights and shares as of June 30, 2025 in Paris, France. Important numbers not provided.

data.title: Yingfa Ruineng joins UN Global Compact on July 4, 2025, showing commitment to sustainability in photovoltaic sector.
data.description: Yingfa Ruineng, a technology company based in Yibin, China, made headlines on July 4, 2025, by officially joining the United Nations Global Compact (UNGC). This strategic decision showcases the company's dedication to sustainability by aligning its practices with international standards. The move highlights Yingfa Ruineng's goal to promote responsible business operations and uphold ethical principles. With this accession, Yingfa Ruineng joins a global network that includes thousands of companies and a presence in over 160 countries, further solidifying its stance on sustainable development.
